settings.tagline: Three balls. Three ranges. Zero effort from you.

settings.title: What's in the Box
settings.value_1: 1× launcher, 3× standard tennis balls, 1× power adapter
settings.value_4: Standard tennis balls — replacements available anywhere

settings.title: Safety & Suitability
settings.content:
Minimum weight: 10kg. Not suitable for very small dogs or dogs that have never played fetch.

Supervised use only. Do not allow your dog to stand directly in front of the launcher while loaded. Introduce gradually.

settings.title: Shipping & Returns
settings.content:
Free worldwide shipping on all orders. Express available at checkout.

Free 30-day returns on all non-personalised items. Items must be unworn and in original packaging.

settings.title: Setup & Use
settings.content: Place launcher on a flat surface. Load a ball from the top opening. The launcher will automatically fire after a short delay. Your dog will figure it out — most do within 10 minutes.

settings.name: Enrichment First
settings.description: Play that engages their brain, not just their jaws. Every PAWD toy is chosen for enrichment value.

settings.name: Pet-Safe Materials
settings.description: Natural rubber, fleece, and rope — no toxic plastics, no sharp edges.

settings.name: For Every Play Style
settings.description: Chewers, chasers, tuggers, and fetch fanatics — we stock toys matched to how your pet plays.

settings.text: I've never seen my dog get this excited. The quality feels incredible — super durable and looks beautiful. It's rare to find pet products that are both functional and this stylish. PAWD nailed it.
settings.author: Olivia M.

settings.text: The personalised collar is the prettiest I've ever seen. The stitching, the softness, the engraving — all of it feels so intentional. Worth every cent and more.
settings.author: Jack L.
